site_title: Green Santara JSC | Sustainable Agriculture Supply Chains
seo_description: Green Santara JSC develops sustainable, traceable, and certified agricultural supply chains across Vietnam for coffee, black pepper, and macadamia.
seo_keywords: Green Santara, sustainable agriculture Vietnam, traceable coffee, organic black pepper, macadamia Vietnam, EUDR coffee, farmer partnerships
og_title: Green Santara JSC | Sustainable Agriculture in Vietnam
og_description: Cultivating sustainability, empowering farmers, and delivering traceable agricultural quality from Vietnam to global markets.
hero_title: Cultivating Sustainability. Empowering Farmers. Delivering Traceable Quality.
hero_subtitle: Building sustainable, traceable, and certified agricultural supply chains across Vietnam while improving farmer livelihoods and connecting communities to global markets.
about_ics_description: Designed for transparent farm records, certification readiness, and supply chain confidence.
about_paragraph_1: Green Santara JSC is a Vietnam-based agricultural Joint Stock Company dedicated to developing sustainable, traceable, and certified agricultural supply chains. Working closely with farmers, cooperatives, and international partners, Green Santara promotes environmentally responsible farming practices while improving farmer livelihoods and market access.
about_paragraph_2: Our mission is to create long-term value for farming communities through organic agriculture, sustainability programs, climate-smart farming, and transparent supply chains.
about_paragraph_3: Through our Internal Control System (ICS), digital traceability platforms, farmer training programs, and certification initiatives, we help farmers meet international standards and connect directly with global markets.
vision_text: To become a leading sustainable agriculture platform in Vietnam, delivering premium agricultural products while protecting nature, supporting rural communities, and promoting responsible farming.
mission_2: Improve farmer incomes through premium markets.
mission_3: Protect soil, water, forests, and biodiversity.
mission_4: Develop fully traceable agricultural supply chains.
mission_5: Deliver high-quality agricultural products to international customers.
sustainability_intro: Green Santara works with farmers, cooperatives, and communities to implement sustainability programs focused on:
organic_text: Supporting farmers in adopting organic farming methods that improve soil health, reduce chemical dependency, and protect ecosystems.
digital_traceability_text: Using HubTrace and digital farm mapping systems to ensure complete farm-to-customer traceability.
products_intro: Coffee, black pepper, and macadamia programs designed around quality, certification compliance, and farm-level transparency.
coffee_image_alt: Coffee plants growing on a plantation
coffee_description: Vietnam is one of the world's leading coffee-producing countries, and Green Santara works closely with coffee farmers to produce high-quality, traceable, and sustainable coffee.
black_pepper_image_alt: Black peppercorns and spices close up
black_pepper_description: Green Santara sources premium Vietnamese black pepper from carefully selected farmer groups committed to sustainable agricultural practices.
macadamia_description: Green Santara collaborates with farmers in the Central Highlands of Vietnam to develop premium macadamia production systems that support long-term sustainability and farmer prosperity.
why_intro: Green Santara connects field-level practices with buyer-ready assurance, helping rural communities and global partners grow from the same foundation of trust.
trace_intro: An integrated pathway that links training, certification, digital traceability, export readiness, and premium market access.
impact_ics_text: Field-level control points for farmer records, audit readiness, and certification consistency.
impact_digital_text: Farm mapping and transaction records that help products remain visible through the chain.
impact_sustainable_text: Soil, water, agroforestry, and biodiversity practices embedded into program design.
impact_market_text: Commercial pathways that reward better practices and support farmer livelihoods.
cta_title: Growing Together for a Sustainable Future
cta_text: Partner with Green Santara JSC to build transparent, sustainable, and globally connected agricultural supply chains.
contact_intro: Connect with Green Santara JSC for product sourcing, farmer partnerships, certification programs, and long-term supply chain collaboration.
map_aria: Google map showing Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
map_title: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam map

footer_summary: A Vietnam-based sustainable agriculture company building transparent supply chains for premium coffee, black pepper, and macadamia.
footer_tagline: Growing Together for a Sustainable Future
